package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationBytesBufferAllocatedPerRecord() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_bytes_buffer_allocated_per_record"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag bytes.Buffer construction per record when a reusable buffer can be reset safely."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
